name: instanode — reliability
description: Single-pane reliability view rolling up every new metric shipped in the 2026-05-20 observability sweep: /readyz across all 3 services, propagation_runner queue health, orphan_sweep activity, magic-link rate-limiting, Brevo send/error/webhook funnel, provisioner circuit-breaker state, missing-renderer events, and storage presign throughput. Source: same Metric + Log feeds as the per-surface dashboards. Apply via newrelic/apply.sh.

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT latest(readyz_check_status) FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'readyz_check_status' FACET service, check SINCE 5 minutes ago
SELECT filter(uniqueCount(check), WHERE readyz_check_status = 0) AS 'failed' FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'readyz_check_status' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT filter(uniqueCount(check), WHERE readyz_check_status = 0.5) AS 'degraded' FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'readyz_check_status' SINCE 1 hour ago

SELECT sum(instant_propagation_dead_lettered_total) AS 'dead_lettered', sum(instant_propagation_unknown_kind_total) AS 'unknown_kind', sum(instant_propagation_unexpected_skip_total) AS 'unexpected_skip' FROM Metric WHERE metricName IN ('instant_propagation_dead_lettered_total', 'instant_propagation_unknown_kind_total', 'instant_propagation_unexpected_skip_total') TIMESERIES SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT sum(instant_propagation_dead_lettered_total) FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'instant_propagation_dead_lettered_total' FACET reason, kind SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT sum(instant_orphan_sweep_reaped_total) FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'instant_orphan_sweep_reaped_total' FACET reason TIMESERIES SINCE 24 hours ago

widgets.title: Orphan sweep — reap failures by reason (24h)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT sum(instant_orphan_sweep_reap_failed_total) FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'instant_orphan_sweep_reap_failed_total' FACET reason TIMESERIES SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT rate(sum(instant_magic_link_email_rate_limited_total), 1 hour) AS 'rate-limited/h' FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'instant_magic_link_email_rate_limited_total' TIMESERIES SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT sum(brevo_send_errors_total) FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'brevo_send_errors_total' FACET classification, status_code SINCE 1 hour ago

SELECT percentage(sum(brevo_webhook_events_total), WHERE event = 'delivered') AS 'delivered %' FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'brevo_webhook_events_total' AND event IN ('delivered', 'bounced_hard', 'bounced_soft', 'rejected', 'complaint', 'deferred', 'unsubscribed', 'error') SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT sum(brevo_webhook_events_total) FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'brevo_webhook_events_total' FACET event SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT sum(email_missing_renderer_total) AS 'missing renderer events' FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'email_missing_renderer_total' FACET kind SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT latest(instant_provisioner_circuit_state) AS 'state (0=CLOSED 1=HALF 2=OPEN)' FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'instant_provisioner_circuit_state' FACET backend TIMESERIES SINCE 6 hours ago

SELECT count(*) AS 'presigns' FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND message LIKE '%storage.presign%' AND message NOT LIKE '%storage.presign.lookup_failed%' AND message NOT LIKE '%storage.presign.sign_failed%' TIMESERIES SINCE 6 hours ago

widgets.title: Billing charge undeliverable (paid, NOT upgraded) — must be 0

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT sum(instant_billing_charge_undeliverable_total) AS 'undelivered upgrades (24h)' FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'instant_billing_charge_undeliverable_total' SINCE 24 hours ago

widgets.title: Tier-upgrade TTL promote outcomes (24h) — error must be 0

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT sum(instant_tier_upgrade_ttl_promote_total) FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'instant_tier_upgrade_ttl_promote_total' TIMESERIES SINCE 24 hours ago FACET outcome

SELECT count(*) AS 'non-ok migration_status events' FROM Log WHERE service IN ('api', 'worker') AND message LIKE '%migration_status%' AND message NOT LIKE '%migration_status\":\"ok%' TIMESERIES SINCE 1 hour ago FACET service

widgets.title: Idempotency replay refunds by route (1h) — FINDING API-1

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT rate(sum(instant_idempotency_replay_refunded_total), 1 minute) AS 'refunds/min' FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'instant_idempotency_replay_refunded_total' TIMESERIES SINCE 1 hour ago FACET route

widgets.title: AUTH-004 synthetic prober — outcomes per leg (1h)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT sum(instant_auth_probe_outcome_total) FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'instant_auth_probe_outcome_total' FACET leg, result TIMESERIES SINCE 1 hour ago

widgets.title: AUTH-004 synthetic prober — fails (last 1h, must be 0)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT sum(instant_auth_probe_outcome_total) AS 'fails' FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'instant_auth_probe_outcome_total' AND result = 'fail' SINCE 1 hour ago

widgets.title: AUTH-004 synthetic prober — P95 latency per leg (1h)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT percentile(instant_auth_probe_latency_seconds, 95) AS 'p95' FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'instant_auth_probe_latency_seconds' FACET leg TIMESERIES SINCE 1 hour ago

widgets.title: Hourly deploy prober — outcomes per leg (6h)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT sum(instant_deploy_probe_outcome_total) FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'instant_deploy_probe_outcome_total' FACET leg, result TIMESERIES SINCE 6 hours ago

widgets.title: Hourly deploy prober — fails (last 6h, must be 0)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT sum(instant_deploy_probe_outcome_total) AS 'fails' FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'instant_deploy_probe_outcome_total' AND result = 'fail' SINCE 6 hours ago

widgets.title: Hourly deploy prober — P95 latency per leg (6h)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT percentile(instant_deploy_probe_latency_seconds, 95) AS 'p95' FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'instant_deploy_probe_latency_seconds' FACET leg TIMESERIES SINCE 6 hours ago
